name: Braised Leeks & Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Green beans, cut into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat sherry and olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the leeks and cook, stirring frequently, for 3 minutes.
3. Add the mushrooms and beans. Cook until the mushrooms begin to release moisture, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the orange juice, orange peel, cider vinegar, salt, and pepper.
5. Remove from heat and serve warm.
